name: quality-scoring-weights
description: Quality scoring must weight answer quality (50%) over routing confidence (25%) and tool success (25%). Use wasToolUsedInAnswer() to check if tool results appear in final answer. Short correct answers (isDirectAnswer) should score high even without tools.

content: Always validate routing_decision and suggested_tool before capture: routing_decision must be one of [local,reason,escalate,external,unknown] and <20 chars (reject schema dumps). suggested_tool must not be meta-names like UserInput/clarify/ask. Use validateRoutingDecision() and validateSuggestedTool().
